description: Export the current Cerebr chat as a self-contained HTML snapshot, or upload it to the hosted short-link service and get a share URL back.

en-US.plugin_description: Export the current Cerebr chat as a self-contained HTML snapshot, or upload it to the hosted short-link service and get a share URL back.
en-US.no_saved_messages: No saved messages in the current chat.
en-US.document_not_focused: Document is not focused. Click inside the Snapshot page and try again.
en-US.share_empty_chat_unavailable: The current chat is empty and cannot be shared yet
en-US.remote_delete_token_unavailable: Remote delete token is unavailable for this history record
en-US.history_delete_unavailable: This remote snapshot requires a delete credential and cannot be deleted anonymously.
en-US.history_confirm_delete_local: Delete this local conversation record? The remote short link will stay online because this record does not have a delete token.
en-US.history_confirm_delete_link: Delete this share link from both local history and the remote server?
en-US.history_confirm_delete_remote: Delete this conversation record and remove the remote snapshot if possible?
en-US.page_subtitle_menu: Save the current Cerebr chat as a styled HTML file
en-US.page_subtitle_default: Export the current chat and styling into a shareable snapshot
en-US.hero_text: Save the current chat into one self-contained HTML file. The snapshot automatically uses the current Cerebr theme and includes metadata, reasoning, and draft content.
en-US.export_settings_description: Configure the share service used for hosted short links.
en-US.server_url_description: POST snapshots to this server and receive a short share link back.
en-US.upload_token_description: Leave blank when the server accepts anonymous uploads.
en-US.recent_exports_description: Search, paginate, open, copy, or delete saved export records.
en-US.find_export_placeholder: Search conversation title, filename, short link, or id
en-US.per_page_description: Choose how many records to show per page.
en-US.history_empty_search: No conversation exports match the current search.
en-US.share_link_unchanged_copy_failed: Share link is unchanged, but copy failed: {reason}
en-US.updated_share_link_removed_old: Updated share link and removed old snapshot #{id}
en-US.updated_share_link_old_missing: Updated share link. The previous remote snapshot was already gone.
en-US.updated_share_link_cleanup_failed: New share link is ready, but cleanup of the old link failed: {reason}
en-US.share_link_unavailable: Share link is unavailable for this record
en-US.deleted_local_and_remote: Deleted local history and remote snapshot #{id}
en-US.remote_missing_local_deleted: Remote snapshot was already gone. Local history record was deleted.
en-US.deleted_local_older_remote_kept: Deleted local history. This older remote short link could not be removed because no delete token was saved.

zh-CN.plugin_description: 将当前 Cerebr 对话导出为自包含 HTML 快照，或上传到托管短链服务并返回分享链接。
zh-CN.no_saved_messages: 当前对话里还没有已保存的消息。
zh-CN.document_not_focused: 当前页面未获得焦点，请先点击快照页面再重试。
zh-CN.share_empty_chat_unavailable: 当前对话为空，暂时不能生成分享链接
zh-CN.server_response_missing_share_url: 服务器响应里缺少 shareUrl
zh-CN.remote_delete_token_unavailable: 当前记录缺少远端删除凭证
zh-CN.history_no_saved: 还没有保存任何对话导出记录。
zh-CN.history_no_match: 没有匹配“{query}”的对话导出记录。
zh-CN.history_showing_matches: 显示第 {start}-{end} 条，共匹配到 {filtered} 条（总计 {total} 条对话）。
zh-CN.history_showing_saved: 显示第 {start}-{end} 条，共 {total} 条已保存对话。
zh-CN.history_delete_unavailable: 当前服务端要求删除凭证，这条远端快照暂时不能匿名删除。
zh-CN.history_confirm_delete_local: 删除这条本地对话记录吗？由于没有保存删除凭证，远端短链会继续保留。
zh-CN.history_confirm_delete_link: 删除这条分享链接，并同时从本地历史和远端服务器移除吗？
zh-CN.history_confirm_delete_remote: 删除这条对话记录，并在可能时同步删除远端快照吗？
zh-CN.page_subtitle_menu: 将当前 Cerebr 对话保存为带样式的 HTML 文件
zh-CN.page_subtitle_default: 把当前对话与样式导出为可分享的快照
zh-CN.hero_text: 把当前对话保存成一个自包含的 HTML 文件。快照会自动使用当前 Cerebr 的主题，并默认包含元数据、推理内容和草稿内容。
zh-CN.export_settings_description: 配置用于生成短链接的分享服务。
zh-CN.server_url_description: 向这个服务器 POST 快照，并接收返回的短链接。
zh-CN.upload_token_description: 如果服务器允许匿名上传，可以留空。
zh-CN.recent_exports_description: 搜索、分页、打开、复制或删除已保存的导出记录。
zh-CN.find_export_placeholder: 搜索对话标题、文件名、短链接或 ID
zh-CN.find_export_description: 当前共保存 {count} 条对话记录。
zh-CN.per_page_description: 选择每页显示多少条记录。
zh-CN.history_empty_search: 当前搜索没有匹配到任何对话导出记录。
zh-CN.share_link_unchanged_copy_failed: 短链接没有变化，但复制失败：{reason}
zh-CN.updated_share_link_removed_old: 已更新短链接，并删除旧快照 #{id}
zh-CN.updated_share_link_old_missing: 短链接已更新，但旧远端快照已经不存在。
zh-CN.updated_share_link_cleanup_failed: 新短链接已经可用，但清理旧链接失败：{reason}
zh-CN.share_link_unavailable: 这条记录没有可用的分享链接
zh-CN.history_entry_not_found: 没有找到这条历史记录
zh-CN.deleted_local_and_remote: 已删除本地历史和远端快照 #{id}
zh-CN.remote_missing_local_deleted: 远端快照已经不存在，本地历史记录已删除。
zh-CN.deleted_local_older_remote_kept: 已删除本地历史。由于旧记录没有保存删除凭证，远端短链会继续保留。
